case_title: CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC A VS. VERONICA BARAHONA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC A CALIFORNIA NON PROFIT CORPORATION
